lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਗਉੜੀ ਗੁਆਰੇਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਚਉਪਦੇ ਦੁਪਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: raag gaurree guaareree mahalaa 1 chaupade dupade |
lines.english: Raag Gauree Gwaarayree, First Mehl, Chau-Padhay & Dho-Padhay:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar sat naam karataa purakh nirbhau niravair akaal moorat ajoonee saibhan gur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace:
The Fear of God is overpowering, and so very heavy,
while the intellect is lightweight, as is the speech one speaks.
So place the Fear of God upon your head, and bear that weight;
by the Grace of the Merciful Lord, contemplate the Guru. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਤਨਿ ਅਗਨਿ ਭਖੈ ਭੈ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: bhai tan agan bhakhai bhai naal |
lines.english: The fire of fear within the body is burnt away by the Fear of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਭਉ ਰਾਖਿਆ ਭਾਇ ਸਵਾਰਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhai bhau raakhiaa bhaae savaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: This Fear of God adorns the Love of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਲੰਘਸਿ ਪਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: bhai bin koe na langhas paar |
lines.english: Without the Fear of God, no one crosses over the world-ocean.
Through this Fear of God, we are adorned with the Word of the Shabad.
Useless is the mold, and useless are the hammer-strokes on the mold. ||2||
Without the Fear of God, all that is fashioned is false.
The desire for the worldly drama arises in the intellect,
but even with thousands of clever mental tricks, the heat of the Fear of God does not come into play.
O Nanak, the speech of the self-willed manmukh is just wind.
Gauree, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਰਿ ਘਰੁ ਘਰਿ ਡਰੁ ਡਰਿ ਡਰੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: ddar ghar ghar ddar ddar ddar jaae |
lines.english: Place the Fear of God within the home of your heart; with this Fear of God in your heart, all other fears shall be frightened away.
His words are worthless and empty, like the wind. ||3||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਡਰੁ ਕੇਹਾ ਜਿਤੁ ਡਰਿ ਡਰੁ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: so ddar kehaa jit ddar ddar paae |
lines.english: What sort of fear is that, which frightens other fears?
Without You, I have other place of rest at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਵਰਤੈ ਸਭ ਤੇਰੀ ਰਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jo kichh varatai sabh teree rajaae |1|
lines.english: Whatever happens is all according to Your Will. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਜੀਉ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਡੂਬੈ ਤਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: naa jeeo marai na ddoobai tarai |
lines.english: The soul does not die; it does not drown, and it does not swim across.
Be afraid, if you have any fear, other than the Fear of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਰਿ ਡਰਿ ਡਰਣਾ ਮਨ ਕਾ ਸੋਰੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ddar ddar ddaranaa man kaa sor |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Afraid of fear, and living in fear, the mind is held in tumult. ||1||Pause||
Before and after, His Command is pervading. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਕਿਛੁ ਕੀਆ ਸੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: jin kichh keea so kichh karai |
lines.english: The One who created everything does everything.
Cruelty, attachment, desire and egotism
By the Hukam of His Command we come, and by the Hukam of His Command we go.
Without doing this, the fools simply die. ||3||
Let the Fear of God be your food, drink and support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਭੂਖ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਨੈ ਸਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: tis vich bhookh bahut nai saan |
lines.english: there is great hunger in these, like the raging torrent of a wild stream.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕਾ ਕੋਇ ਕੋਈ ਕੋਇ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jis kaa koe koee koe koe |
lines.english: If anyone really has anyone else - how rare is that person!

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੇ ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਧਨੁ ਮਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: jaa ke jeea jant dhan maal |
lines.english: All beings and creatures, wealth and property belong to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਤੇਰਾ ਤੂੰ ਸਭਨਾ ਕਾ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ko teraa toon sabhanaa kaa soe |
lines.english: All are Yours - You are the Lord of all.
Let wisdom be your mother, and contentment your father.
O Nanak, it is so difficult to describe and contemplate Him. ||4||2||
Gauree, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਣਾ ਹੈ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kahanaa hai kichh kehan na jaae |
lines.english: He has been described, but He cannot be described at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਪਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tau kudarat keemat nahee paae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Your All-pervading creative nature cannot be estimated. ||1||Pause||
Let Truth be your brother - these are your best relatives. ||1||
